title: PG-004: Production Postgres connection pool and health checks
boundary: Postgres connection pool config passthrough and test coverage
consumer_purpose: Enable production-administrable PG pool sizing/timeout/retry via env vars with tests
claim_atoms: maxRetries); init() accepts optional InitOptions for pool config; initFromPool() bridge creates Drizzle client from PgPool; makePgAdapter/PgAdapter/defaultLayer thread InitOptions from DatabaseConfig; pg-pool.pg.test.ts covers isRetryableError classification
revision_reason: Add change to make isRetryableError public so it can be tested directly — it's a pure classification utility, not an implementation detail
